description: This file defines negation in the Present Perfect tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Present perfect negation expresses actions that have not occurred up to the present moment.

general_principle.structure: Present perfect negation in Balanda is formed by retaining the verb in base form and the present-relevance marker 'dheki', and adding the negation marker 'gba' sentence-finally. The copula 'ma' is not used in present perfect negation.

negation_structure.notes: The verb must remain in base form; The marker 'dheki' must be retained; The negation marker 'gba' must appear sentence-final; The copula 'ma' must not be used

aspectual_distinction.structure: The copula 'ma' is used for negation only in continuous forms with 'ti-'.

semantic_scope.structure: {"functions": ["non-occurrence up to the present", "denial of completion", "lack of experience"]}
semantic_scope.notes: non-occurrence up to the present; denial of completion; lack of experience

error_constraints.structure: Do not use 'ma' in present perfect negation; Do not remove 'dheki' under negation; Do not use past-marked verbs; Do not combine present perfect negation with 'ti-'; Do not move 'gba' from sentence-final position

output: I have not eaten fish
She has not drunk water

input: Danda teli muru famvara dheki gba
output: We have not slept on the bed
Uku has not gone
Ngande has not come home

input: Ndi nonö gbi difo dheki gba
output: They have not walked in the compound
She has not run fast

input: Uku mande gbi njü dheki gba
output: Uku has not worked in the garden

input: Wiki moliki gbi difo dheki gba
output: The child has not played in the compound
I have not watched the dog

input: Ne vele njo balanda dheki gba
output: I have not spoken Balanda
The girl has not written words
I have not read a book
He has not thought about it
They have not known it
I have not asked them

input: Ngande vele zi ndi dheki gba
output: Ngande has not told them

input: Wilii keye ti naa ni dheki gba
output: The girl has not called her mother
I have not loved you

input: Ni maguku ti kpörö dheki gba
output: He has not feared the snake
She has not hated him
Ngande has not surprised him
He has not seemed calm
The girl has not tied the shoe
He has not cut the pot
I have not pulled the door
We have not pushed the box
The girl has not washed the shoe
I have not hidden the beads
Ngande has not built a house
I have not created words
She has not changed the words
I have not turned the door
We have not added money
I have not described Balanda
They have not helped the poor
Ngande has not initiated the project
I have not contributed to the project
The girl has not separated trash
We have not upheld the law
I have not wanted water
She has not given money
I have not found money
Uku has not tried the cloth
Ngande has not left home
I have not arrived in Wau
He has not sharpened the knife
Ngande has not imitated adults
We have not started the project
He has not fallen
